mnemonics.title: SAFE RACK
mnemonics.content: SAFE RACK - Sensors, Actuators, Firmware, Edge computing. Radio, Access control, Controller, Kit - components of IoT endpoints

mnemonics.title: Endpoint Characteristics
mnemonics.content: SCCP - Sense (detect), Connect (communicate), Compute (process), Power (energy efficient) - four key traits of IoT endpoints

mnemonics.title: IoT Architecture Layers
mnemonics.content: PNPA - Perception (devices), Network (protocols), Processing (cloud/edge), Application (dashboards) - bottom to top

mnemonics.title: Connectivity Options
mnemonics.content: Short-to-Long: BLE (meters) -> WiFi (tens of meters) -> Cellular (km) -> LoRaWAN (km+) -> Satellite (global)
